name: editChatInviteLink
description: Use this method to edit a non-primary invite link created by the bot. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target channel in the format @username

parameters.name: expire_date
parameters.description: Point in time (Unix timestamp) when the link will expire

parameters.name: member_limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of users that can be members of the chat simultaneously after joining the chat via this invite link; 1-99999

parameters.name: creates_join_request
parameters.description: True, if users joining the chat via the link need to be approved by chat administrators. If True, member_limit can't be specified.
